commit-log:
- Global search in all extensions at same time,
Show toast when copying to clipboard,
Fully removed internal temporary anilist provider,
Fixed saving tab index in MainActivity,
Topbar in the SearchActivity is now collapsable,
Temporary disabled Globally excluded tags due to removed internal anilist provider ~MrBoomDev
- Filters are now being applied in Aniyomi extensions,
Fixed crash when trying to save filters,
Fix theme not being applied in the SplashActivity,
Removed scale part from tab switch animation,
Change CatalogEpisode and CatalogVideo into Serializable instead of Parcelable,
Added more feeds to the dantotsu template ~MrBoomDev

workflow.title: Global search in all extensions at same time,
